message:
🌱 refactor: remove redundant useUniversalStats() from 27 page components (#9965)

DashboardPage already calls useUniversalStats() internally and merges it
with the custom stat getter. Every page component was calling it again and
re-merging, doubling all sub-hook invocations on every dashboard page load.

This is the same root cause as #9957 (6 GA4 auth errors on /alerts).
The pattern existed in 27 page components across the codebase.

Fix: remove the redundant import, hook call, and createMergedStatValueGetter
wrapper from each page component. Pass the page-specific stat getter directly
to DashboardPage, which handles the universal stats merge itself.

Affected components: AIAgents, AIML, Alerts, ClusterAdmin, Clusters,
Compliance, Compute, Cost, CustomDashboard, Dashboard, DataCompliance,
Deploy, Deployments, Events, GitOps, HelmReleases, Insights, KarmadaOps,
Logs, MultiTenancy, Network, Nodes, Operators, Pods, Security, Services,
Storage (27 files total)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
